examples: OBJECTIVE To investigate the feasibility of ethosome gel as transdermal carries of ethinyl estradiol (EE).
Approved by the FDA in 2001, the patch is sold by prescription and releases ethinyl estradiol (a type of estrogen), and a progestin called norelgestromin via the skin into the bloodstream.
Objective: to study the feasibility and optimal regimen of oral low dose gossypol acetate (GA) combined with methyltestosterone (MT) plus ethinyl estradiol (EE) for contraception in male rats.
